metaTitle: Cutup — AI subtitles & transcripts for creators, students & pros
metaDescription: Paste a link. Get timed subtitles and a clean transcript in under a minute—no login for your first preview. Built for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram & files.

sections.title: Turn any video into subtitles in seconds — ready to publish
sections.subtitle: Subtitles & transcripts · AI-powered · Used by creators, students, and teams · Supports YouTube, TikTok, Instagram & audio files
sections.body: Creators stop retyping captions. Students turn lectures into notes. Professionals export clean transcripts—fast, simple, and powerful. Your first preview runs in seconds.

sections.label: Interactive tool (homepage)
sections.html: <!-- Live tool UI: YouTube / TikTok / Instagram tabs + upload. Managed in index.html script stack. -->
sections.note: The download / transcript tool is embedded in the static homepage. Edit labels and structure in the site template or replace with a custom HTML block.

sections.body:
See what you get in seconds

Timed lines you can drop into any editor—this is the kind of structure Cutup builds from your link or file.

Product preview frame — visual demo cards on the live site.

sections.heading: Built for how you actually work

items.title: Creators & YouTubers
items.text: Batch shorts and long-form. Get a timed SRT you can tweak in your editor—less time in post, more time publishing.

items.title: Students & lifelong learners
items.text: Turn lectures and explainers into searchable text. Skim, highlight, and study without scrubbing the timeline.

items.title: Professionals & teams
items.text: Document calls, webinars, and interviews with transcripts you can share—consistent quality without a transcription agency.

sections.heading: Export subtitles, transcripts, and summaries in seconds

items.title: SRT in seconds
items.text: Paste a link and get a timed subtitle preview instantly. Upgrade to download the full SRT.

items.title: Whisper-grade transcription
items.text: High-quality speech-to-text for long videos and noisy audio when captions are missing.

items.title: AI summaries
items.text: Turn hours of talking heads into short paragraphs and bullet takeaways you can share.

items.title: Multilingual
items.text: Translate transcripts, summaries, and subtitle tracks to the languages your audience speaks.

items.title: Upload audio & video
items.text: Drop a podcast episode, lecture recording, or screen capture—no hosting required.

items.title: Export to TXT & DOCX
items.text: Download polished documents for editors, legal workflows, or content repurposing.

items.title: Usage dashboard
items.text: Sign in to see how many videos you have left this month, track downloads, and revisit history in one calm control panel.

items.title: Preview without friction
items.text: Try the workflow before you pay—see the hook, then unlock the full file when you are ready.

items.label: Paste or upload
items.text: Drop a YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram URL—or upload your own media file.

items.label: Pick your output
items.text: Generate subtitles, full transcript, or an AI summary with one click.

items.label: Preview instantly
items.text: See the first chunk of subtitles and text without creating an account.

items.label: Unlock everything
items.text: Log in, upgrade, and export the complete SRT, translations, and documents.

sections.heading: Pricing that speaks your language
sections.intro: Clear monthly limits per plan. Pick a tier by how much you publish—creators, students, and teams all start with the same simple workflow.
sections.footnote: Plans renew monthly in EUR. You’ll always see the exact total on the checkout page before you confirm.

plans.name: Free · €0
plans.description: Perfect for a quick proof-of-concept. Preview subtitles & text, feel the workflow, then upgrade when you are ready to ship.

items.a: No. Paste a link and preview timed subtitles right away. A free account adds history, saved outputs, and higher limits when you’re ready.
Most short-to-medium videos finish in about a minute. Longer files take a bit more—you’ll see progress in the tool so you’re never guessing.
YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram links work out of the box. You can also upload audio or video files when you want to run everything in one place.
Yes. Paid plans unlock full SRT downloads and exports so you can drop captions straight into your editor or upload platform.
You get a real in-browser preview without a card. When you need full files, longer clips, or higher volume, upgrading takes one minute.
Transcription and subtitles work across many languages—pick the output language you need in the tool. Paid plans add translation for SRT, transcript, and summaries.

items.q: Can I edit subtitles before exporting?
items.a: Absolutely. Review timing and text in the preview, tweak what you need, then export when it matches your style.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Payments are handled securely via international card processors. You can pay with Visa, Mastercard, and other global payment methods. Pricing is in EUR.

items.q: Can I translate subtitles for other markets?
items.a: Yes. On paid plans you can translate SRT, full transcript, and summaries so one video can ship in multiple languages.

items.q: Where do I manage my plan?
items.a: After you sign in, your dashboard shows usage, saved work, and plan options in one place—no digging through emails.
